turns.user_message: My friend said I always seem to have an excuse. I guess I do try to explain things away too much.
I keep hearing that comment in my head when I mess up. It feels like I'm always proving them right.
I'm starting to think I should just accept that I'm the problem. Maybe I need to talk to someone about why I can't let this go.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did.
